course_title: The Classical Tradition in Western Literature
description:
Offered: every fourth semester
An examination of some of the most influential texts of classical antiquity and the subsequent literary tradition that arose in the West. Students will read epics, lyric poetry and drama, which may include selections from Homer, Virgil, Ovid, Horace, Euripedes, Aeschylus, Terence, Seneca, and contemporary works influenced by the classics.
Prerequisite(s): ENGL 1200
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA, LI
